content_body: I got a few friends together to go on a weekend two day retreat. We definitely got more than what we expected. The lodge was beautiful. The scenery was tranquil. We could not stop taking pictures. :) The weekend went so fast that we wished we would have stayed longer. We played games, cooked, went walking down by the river and just catch up on all the things we had all been doing. We even saw the train go by from one of top floor rooms; which was nice. Speaking of rooms... all the rooms were very nice. We are definitely going back soon.
title: Riverview Lodge is Amazing!
